description: In openLCA, you are adapting a generic dataset for a specific facility. Import the USLCI database from ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip and create a facility-specific version of a steel manufacturing process (e.g., 'Steel, plate, at plant') by appending ' - Facility XYZ' to its name. Modify the input exchanges of the new process to reflect efficiency improvements: a 20% reduction in 'Electricity' and a 12% reduction in 'Natural gas' (or primary fuel). Export a report to ~/LCA_Results/process_customization_report.csv listing the original and new process names, as well as the original and new amounts for both Electricity and Fuel/Gas.
